avoid: Do not hardcode hidden dimension sizes
Do not rely on result caching as a general optimization
Do not revert to handwritten rank-16 kernels unless cuBLAS path is proven incorrect or slower than baseline
evidence: Aggregate speedup 1.0004, indicating no improvement over ATen
Profiler identifies multiple ATen GEMM launches as bottleneck

recommended_actions: fuse rank-16 update into the output tensor
test scalar and vectorized rank-16 kernels
Implement pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM: direct cublasSgemm for W@X, for B.T@X (use CUBLAS_OP_T to avoid explicit transpose), for A@U, accumulate with beta=1 into Y
Avoid explicit transpose of B; use appropriate transa/transb flags and leading dimensions
Reduce kernel launch overhead by replacing ATen calls with direct cuBLAS API calls
Use a temporary U of shape [d, 16] for the low-rank intermediate, ensuring column-major layout for cuBLAS
